# 42nights Vendor Negotiation Playbook

## Pricing principle
The standard 42nights vendor procurement target is a **24% discount off
publicly listed retail pricing**. For enterprise SaaS, the team typically
opens at 35% and lands between 22% and 28% on the first multi-year contract.

## Net payment terms
The default ask is **net-60** payment terms. Net-45 is acceptable for
strategic partners. Never go below net-30 without Ayaan's sign-off.

## Renewal cap
All multi-year deals must include a renewal cap of no more than **5% annual
uplift**. Vendors who refuse this hard cap should be deprioritized.

## Termination
A 30-day mutual termination-for-convenience clause is non-negotiable. If a
vendor strips it out during redlines, escalate to Ayaan within 24 hours.

## Approval thresholds
Spend under $5,000 / quarter can be approved by any team member. Spend
between $5,000 and $25,000 / quarter requires Ayaan's approval. Spend
above $25,000 / quarter requires both Ayaan and the engagement's customer
sponsor to sign off.
